source_of_truth: This manifest is the normative lexical source for editor tooling.

notes: Only # line comments are currently specified.
TODO(ARX-LEX-COMMENT-002): confirm whether // will be introduced as a comment delimiter.
TODO(ARX-LEX-STRINGS-001): define string literals and escapes.

identifiers.unicode_policy: Current behavior follows Unicode categories from host runtime. TODO(ARX-LEX-IDENT-001): formalize policy (e.g., XID_Start/XID_Continue vs ASCII-only).

notes: Annotation lines use the token sequence '@[' modifier names separated by commas and closed by ']'.
Template parameter blocks use '@<' bounded parameters separated by commas and closed by '>' before function or method declarations.
Explicit template call arguments use '<' and '>' between the callee name and the call '('.
Grouped imports use parentheses, require 'from', and may include trailing commas.
Relative from-imports use one or more leading '.' tokens before the module path.
